# Perch

> Perch is an editorial decision engine for housing. It helps people explore with structure, understand tradeoffs instantly, and build a shortlist they can trust.

Perch is not a generic SaaS dashboard or a property marketplace. It is a calm, product-led housing experience focused on clarity, comparison, and decision support.

## Canonical site

- [Perch homepage](https://perch.so/): Main marketing website and canonical public entry point.

## Key positioning

- Editorial decision engine for housing
- Explore with structure
- Understand tradeoffs instantly
- Build a shortlist you can trust
- Calm, premium, product-led housing search

## Audience

- Renters choosing between a small number of viable homes
- Operators and partners building better housing search experiences
- Teams interested in decision support rather than marketplace-style browsing

## Preferred summary

Perch helps people choose where to live with more structure and less noise. It combines place awareness, progressive onboarding, editorial property discovery, validation, and shortlist comparison into a calmer housing search experience.

## Language support

- English
- Spanish

## Structured content

- [Expanded LLM summary](https://perch.so/llms-full.txt): Longer version with product framing, messaging, and page structure.
